author: rscopic
description: Override the vault's display name. Intended to disambiguate vaults with the same folder name when adhering to a common folder structure between projects.

manifest.author: @rscopic
manifest.description: Override the vault's display name and/or title order. Intended to disambiguate vaults with the same folder name when adhering to a common folder structure between projects.
manifest.name: Vault Nickname

name: Vault Nickname

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: strip UTF-8 BOM from settings files; require electron explicitly by @dudareviv in https://github.com/rscopic/obsidian-vault-nickname/pull/7

## New Contributors
* @dudareviv made their first contribution in https://github.com/rscopic/obsidian-vault-nickname/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rscopic/obsidian-vault-nickname/compare/1.1.11...1.1.12

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Fixes a code oversight in v1.1.10

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Fixed #5: Paths on Linux no longer lose their root slash when being normalized. (Thanks @dominique-unruh!)

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Fixed #4: The vault's nickname is now stored in the plugin's install folder rather than in a hidden file inside the vault root. This is more organized. The previous method is still supported to provide backwards compatibility. (Thanks @rashad-malik!)

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Fixed #3: The vault switcher menu now correctly displays the vault nicknames on Linux (tested on Arch Linux). (Thanks @jakeanq!)

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Fixed #2: The vault switcher menu now correctly displays all vaults, not just those that have this plugin installed. (Thanks @claremacrae!)

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Fixed #1: The vault's nickname now appears correctly in the vault switcher menu on macOS. (Thanks @t0b1hh!)

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Set `isDesktopOnly=true`. 
  * The plugin uses the `fs` API to access data across vaults and this is not available on mobile.

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

* Added support for mobile. The nickname is limited to appearing in the sidebar. The Manage Vaults window is controlled via native code and cannot be changed by plugins.
* Added options for overriding the app's title:
   * **Off**: Use Obsidian's default app title with the non-nicknamed vault title.
   * **Vault name first**: Formats the title as `<vault_nickname> - <file_name> - <obsidian_version>`.
   * **File name first**: Formats the title as `<file_name> - <vault_nickname> - <obsidian_version>`.
* Fixed app title not updating when the active file is renamed.

![Vault nickname on mobile.](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ac6033af-41f5-47a3-aac4-60eb73ad87dd)

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:

### Code review:
* Set `isDesktopOnly` to true. This is necessary until a way is learned that allows vault list to be queried on mobile.
* Removed dependency on Node.js "fs" library. Replaced with calls to `vault.adapter.fs`.

### Other changes:
* Prevent unnecessary nickname file reads when the vault switcher menu is being closed.

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:
* Restore the default vault display name when plugin is unloaded.
* Use Obsidian's API to determine the platform and to automate unscribing from events.

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:
* Avoids redundant save of the plugin's settings at startup when the settings file already exists.

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Changes:
* Added a "Set nickname" shortcut to vault switcher context menu that opens the plugin's settings tab.
   ![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/97cd9287-4931-42c7-afad-fecb0248d988)
* Added a button to the settings tab that will apply the name of the vault's parent folder as the nickname.
   ![vault-nickname-settings](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/43838a0a-ad0b-4cc6-8cae-8a63ebcee74d)
* The name of the vault's parent folder is now used as the default nickname.
* The vault's nickname is now displayed in the window title.
* Changed the location of the plugin's settings file to a hidden file in the root of the vault (`/.vault-nickname`). This change addresses an issue raised during review by Obsidian and will be used until a better solution is discovered: 
   https://forum.obsidian.md/t/sharing-plugin-data-between-vaults-stumped-by-override-config-folder/92570/1

releases.author: rscopic
releases.description:
## Features:
- Assign a vault nickname using the vault's settings window.
- The nickname is displayed in the vault switcher (bottom-left of the workspace).
- When the plugin is active and also installed in other vaults, the vault switcher menu will display the other vaults' nicknames in the dropdown.

Tested using Windows 10.
